name: De Minimis Exception for Compensation and Shareholder Loans

eligibility.description: Aggregate outstanding loans between the parties must not exceed $10,000 and must not have tax avoidance as a principal purpose.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts compensation-related or corporation-shareholder below-market loans from imputed interest rules if the aggregate balance is $10,000 or less.
